description_long: This object is a detailed representation of an octopus, characterized by its bulbous, textured head and eight long, flexible arms adorned with rows of white suction cups. The skin is a rich reddish-brown, with subtle variations in hue and a slightly rough, matte finish, giving it a lifelike appearance. The arms are intricately curled and splayed in various directions, showcasing the creature's natural flexibility and dynamic posture. The head features small, prominent eyes set on either side, providing a sense of alertness and awareness. The surface of the body is dotted with small bumps and textures, mimicking the natural skin of an octopus. Overall, the object captures the organic complexity and tactile qualities of a real marine cephalopod.
description: A reddish-brown octopus with eight curled arms, white suction cups, and a textured, bulbous head. The surface is matte and detailed, with lifelike skin bumps and prominent eyes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the octopus's head, both eyes, and the spread of its arms with visible suction cups.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the right side of the head, one prominent eye, and the dynamic curling of the arms.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the head and the arms extending outward, with suction cups less visible.
description_view_3: Left-side view displaying the head profile, one eye, and the intricate curling of the arms.
